title: [CODEREVIEW-PASS2] security: node.py address builder
description: python/src/lichen/node.py:57 - top-level _build_address uses fixed ULA prefix, no injection or overflow. Consistent with ipv6/addr.py patterns. No security findings.
notes:

Implemented consistent ULA address builder using ipv6.addr.make_ula and IPv6Network for validation and to eliminate duplicated prefix construction. Tests and ruff pass (pre-existing lint issue untouched per scope).
